features: Stainless Steel Construction: The bathtub storage rack is made from quality stainless steel, ensuring resistance to rust and corrosion while maintaining a sleek silver finish.
Extendable Design: The adjustable design of this bathtub tray allows it to fit most bathtubs, providing a versatile solution for your bathing needs.
Convenient Storage: This bath Storage Rack tray features adjustable holders that can securely hold your book, magazine, or wine glass, making your relaxation time more enjoyable.
Portable and Lightweight: The bathtub rack is designed to be portable and lightweight, making it easy to carry and store when not in use, ideal for home use.
Perfect for Relaxation: Whether you want to enjoy a movie or sip your favorite drink, this bath tray enhances your soaking experience and adds a touch of luxury to your bath.
